recommended_next: P18-FORWARDINV-STRUCTURAL-REFACTOR: investigate why typeclass synthesis is stuck on a fully-explicit siarc_flow F T S call where all 9 [NormedAddCommGroup F.carrier] etc. instance args are present in the ambient variable block. Possible approaches: (1) rewrite siarc_flow body to avoid the auto-inferred X type parameter on Flow, e.g. by using @Flow.mk (StateSpace F T S) directly; (2) inline siarc_flow body into the SafetyCertificate.invariance field; (3) declare a section namespace with these instances pre-fixed; (4) consider that the variable block's [NormedAddCommGroup F.carrier] uses F.carrier (a field projection) which may not match instance synthesis pattern when F is bound as explicit. Try `(carrier : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup carrier] ...` in the variable block instead of `F.carrier`-based instances.
